3220720.name: Only Arrows
3220720.description:
FREE DEMO AVAILABLE!

Only Arrows is a 2D puzzle game, where the rules are everchanging but only controls you'll have are the movement keys.

You'll explore grid-based maps, encountering both self-contained logic puzzles and exploration based treasure hunts.

Test things out, learn and study the environment to get the keys required to advance further.

Full release features:

  • 10 levels, each with its own theme

  • Every level comprised of several logic puzzles and movement challenges, each unique

  • Trophies for completing everything in a level

  • Only movement keys to control everything in the game
3220720.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
